About Organization

The Indian Army is the land-based branch and the largest component of the Indian Armed Forces.

The Indian Army is responsible for protecting the nation from external threats and maintaining peace and security within the country.

About the Programme

The Indian Army Agniveer Rally CEE Result 2026 is a recruitment programme for Indian citizens who want to join the Indian Army.

The programme aims to select eligible candidates for various posts in the Indian Army, including Agniveer, ARO, ZRO, Agniveer Women, Sepoy Pharma, and Soldier Technical.
